title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by going to Settings, then clicking Security, and selecting Reset Password option.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can permanently delete their account from Account Settings by clicking Delete Account and confirming the action.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact support via email at support@company.com or call our helpline at 1800-123-456 available 24/7.

title: Update Profile
content: Users can update their profile information including name, photo and bio from Profile Settings by clicking Edit Profile.

title: Payment Methods
content: Users can add, remove or update payment methods from Billing section under Payment Methods tab.

title: Privacy Settings
content: Users can manage their privacy settings including who can see their profile and posts from Settings under Privacy tab.

title: Notification Settings
content: Users can enable or disable notifications for emails, SMS and push notifications from Settings under Notifications tab.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Users can enable two factor authentication for extra security from Settings under Security by clicking Enable 2FA.
